description: A premium trading journal for Futures and Crypto Daytraders, offering advanced analytics like P&L, win-rate, entry/exit timing, backtesting, and equity curve tracking.
target_audience: Daytraders (Futures and Crypto) making 10-30 trades per day.
original_prompt: Premium Trading Journal fuer Futures und Crypto Daytrader. Dark theme mit Electric Blue und Magenta Akzent. Inspiriert von Tradezella + Linear.app. Features: P&L Analytics per Strategy, Win-Rate per Setup/Timeframe, Entry/Exit Timing Heatmap, Backtesting, Equity Curve. Zielgruppe: Trader mit 10-30 Trades/Tag. Pricing: Starter Free, Pro 39/mo, Elite 89/mo, 14-Tage Trial.
